description.value:
The Queen's Physicians' beaked masks (Ch.2; Appendix 5: 2,000 gp → 200 gp). Invested.

  • +1 item bonus to saves vs. inhaled threats and olfactory effects.
  • Immunity to one disease, chosen at creation — every mask in this campaign is keyed to blood veil (which is why the doctors never sicken).
  • Veiled aura: divination reads the wearer as an ordinary, unremarkable citizen (@Check[type:perception|dc:24] for a detecting caster to notice the veil itself).

A recovered mask is hard evidence the 'physicians' expected the plague.

publication.title: Pathfinder: Curse of the Crimson Throne (PF2e conversion, private)
